Table of Contents

Enum esriSRGeoTransformation2Type

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

More datum transformations: longitude rotation, NADCON, HARN and NTv2 methods.
